**Compressed Working Context - Operational Log (2026-07-19)**

**Scope:** Infrastructure operations log covering 15 services (billing-worker, report-builder, session-manager, webhook-relay, search-indexer, cache-warmer, audit-logger, metrics-collector, ingest-api, user-profile-service, scheduler-core, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, export-pipeline, auth-service) across 6 environments (dev sandbox, QA cluster, production, staging, blue/green/canary pools).

**Operations Performed (60+ instances):** Mix of scale (up/down), upgrades, migrations, patches, restarts, reconfigurations, rollbacks, health-checks, drains, redeploys, pauses, and downgrades.

**Outcome Distribution:**
- Completed without errors: ~40%
- Finished ahead of schedule: ~20%
- Required manual retry: ~10%
- Took longer than expected: ~15%
- Emitted warnings: ~15%

**Follow-up Actions:** Configuration tidying tasks filed, documentation updated, postmortem notes added, thresholds flagged for review next week.

**Operational Health:** No active incidents or escalations. Pager remained quiet throughout most shifts. CPU utilization returned to baseline within hours of changes. Retry queues drained to zero following operations. Dashboard changes confirmed within minutes. No customer impact observed during any operations.

**Key Technical Identifiers (if needed for reference):**
Build: CKSQBVDT | API key: PZD8GFFU | TLS cert: 2H4389QQ | Incident: GCDRHARC | Deploy ticket: 7QXB2286 | Dashboard UID: Q4VQ3W6E | Rollback tag: 9KF3F68C | Queue topic: AR586HHA | Registry token: PRVCYV6V | Webhook secret: S6ZD3FE2 | DB password (staging): AQ2MKQUS | Account ref: RX2R33X7 | On-call key: YFNMHTU2 | Cron job: S428ZGC5 | Session nonce: 26V3GJFM

**Status:** All operations executed as routine maintenance with standard follow-up procedures. No escalation required. Work is ready to continue.
